subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-16 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: We are waiting to see that perchance, God willing, a new breeze may waft over India, a new spirituality may be obtained
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
